name: 04-serve-and-docker
title: Serve mode + Web UI + Docker (Slice 4)
description: Implement confighub serve (HTTP API + server-rendered web UI), token auth required for non-loopback bind, direct template read with secret redaction, bundle archive download, basic web pages (status/profiles/bundle/bootstrap/warning), token CRUD commands, multi-stage Dockerfile (distroless final), ops/systemd unit, ops/Caddyfile example, ops/README deploy guide.
creator: Ruichen Zhou
